body_transformation: The leaf bulb on its back transforms into a molten gold orb with crimson lava cracks, radiating heat waves that distort the air around it. Its pale cream underbelly shifts to a smoky charcoal texture with faint ember sparks glowing through cracks. The leaf-like patterns on its skin become jagged, magma-cracked scales in burnt orange and deep obsidian. The curled tail tip now glows with molten gold, its spiral shape intact but edged with shimmering ember trails.
signature_feature: Back orb: molten gold with crimson lava cracks and heat-haze distortion.
